lines.text: We are glad that you are returning home after recovering from illness. We hope that you are
satisfied with the free health services provided under Ayushman Bharat Pradhan Mantri Jan
will help us to improve the services being offered under the scheme.
We also request you to share your experience with others and encourage them to e!
their Ayushman cards by visiting CSC or empanelled hospital.
We wish yu nd yor fmil aappy &healthy ie ad.
